75774.subject: Onchain Assets Weekly: 7/10/26
75774.body:
Onchain Assets Weekly

–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: Securitize


–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: Securitize

    
    
    –Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞–є—В–µ —Ж—О —Б—В–∞—В—В—О –љ–∞ LinkedIn, —Й–Њ–± –њ—А–Є—Ф–і–љ–∞—В–Є—Б—П –і–Њ –Њ–±–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А–µ–љ–љ—П
–Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞—В–Є –љ–∞ LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/onchain-assets-weekly-71026-securitize-7sftc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BbhIoprhcSRaPXT7USGJfIg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=066ZYcCXOMDIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrf8e6ak~hz-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrf8e6ak-hz
  
Last week, Securitize began trading on the NYSE under the ticker SECZ. This week, we got to mark that moment in person, ringing the Closing Bell in New York. The bigger story keeps building too: issuer-sponsored tokenization continues to be a conversation across Wall Street, crypto media, and business media. Securitize Rings the NYSE Closing Bell | Securitize The Securitize team gathered at the NYSE to celebrate going public by ringing the Closing Bell. WATCH NOW Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo Talks Tokenization Strategy Following NYSE Debut | NYSE Carlos Domingo joined NYSE Live and reflected on SecuritizeвАЩs NYSE debut: from ringing the Closing Bell to taking Securitize public. WATCH NOW Billy Miller on Why Securitize Went Public Through a SPAC | The Rollup Securitize COO Billy Miller joined The Rollup to discuss the companyвАЩs NYSE debut, including one question many market participants have asked: why go public through a SPAC? WATCH NOW Securitize's Issuer-Sponsored Stock Token: Why DeFi Rails Need Real Shares, Not Wrappers | Crypto DailyвДҐ CryptoDaily looks at SecuritizeвАЩs issuer-sponsored SECZ stock token вАФ and why representing the same NYSE-listed common stock, not a wrapper or synthetic, matters. READ MORE Securitize Begins Trading on NYSE as Tokenized Shares Land on Solana and Avalanche | Decrypt A full recap of the public-market debut, including how SECZ became the largest tokenized stock in the world, with shares live on Avalanche, Solana, and its own regulated platform. READ MORE
–Я—А–Є—Ф–і–љ–∞—В–Є—Б—П –і–Њ –Њ–±–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А–µ–љ–љ—П
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/onchain-assets-weekly-71026-securitize-7sftc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BbhIoprhcSRaPXT7USGJfIg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=066ZYcCXOMDIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mrf8e6ak~hz-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrf8e6ak-hz

My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)

75773.subject: рЯФЈ The Daily: Circle wins final OCC bank approval
75773.body:
Polymarket files applications to offer regulated margin trading in US | Kraken and Revolut push agentic trading as AI race grips crypto exchanges | New Hampshire's $100 million bitcoin bond proposal fails to pass final vote | Binance co-CEO says 70% of EU withdrawals went to self-custody after MiCA deadline, with just 30% going to licensed platforms |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Kyle Baird

Presented by

BitGo ( https://www.bitgo.com/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Friday рЯОЙ *Standard Chartered* analysts said ( https://www.theblock.co/post/407884/communication-challenge-nothing-more-standard-chartered-keeps-100000-bitcoin-target-calls-strategy-selloff-a-signaling-problem?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) the recent *Strategy* -driven *bitcoin* selloff is more a communication misstep than a fundamental problem, reiterating their $100,000 year-end BTC price target.

In today's newsletter, *Circle* secures *OCC* approval to establish a national trust bank, *Polymarket* files to offer regulated margin trading, *Kraken* and *Revolut* push agentic trading, and more.

Meanwhile, *Cambridge Centre for Alternative Finance* research puts 31% of *Ethereum* node activity in the U.S., flagging ( https://www.theblock.co/post/407909/cambridge-research-puts-ethereum-node-activity-in-us-where-third-offline-can-stall-finalization?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) that the network stops finalizing if more than a third of validators go offline at once.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read вАФ and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*рЯП¶ Stablecoin firm Circle wins final OCC approval to open national trust bank*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/407876/stablecoin-firm-circle-wins-final-occ-approval-to-open-national-trust-bank?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Stablecoin issuer *Circle* secured final *OCC* approval to establish a national trust bank, *First National Digital Currency Bank* , operating as *Circle National Trust* under direct federal oversight.

* The bank will provide fiduciary digital asset custody for Circle and its affiliates at launch, with management of the *USDC Reserve* вАФ a key aim of the original application вАФ deferred to a future phase.
* The charter doesn't permit Circle to accept cash deposits or make loans, but lets it hold cus

75768.subject: Success in the fight against dementia
75768.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MzN9AAcAAAAAA9FFOwrL8To1QaTnFv47zx3B0rXRu_Gtg5i2pxkFJ_VWuJCcwIKPvDUvCFF0dQeWMqvkwgr9cK67L9hJE_QJKuO1aa4ucOb1D_f7SHP_cDVZ8A 

July 10th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MzN9AAcAAAAAA9FFOwrMfa9m7-k82xLqm_Bi6nVe4ni1PQ_hMo6XuvA1TA_V6xpRGm-vNkKLx0qrwF2deM_rykCLWwGA1-0FMwqhq8-IjWepdeU7-tXWSon0ug 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MzN9AAcAAAAAA9FFOwrNhMiVZmGTcKITQS8zHRU3nAOccKQgXlFUdpzxIjMKNUcNBVUGamIC-aF86rHxLyRC7Uw9gX1LobJmT_SY82i2SfWGmKVq5Hg2Fe1M7w 


 


 
 

Stephanie Studer

Senior digital editor



 Dementia rates are falling among old people—in America but also in several European countries and Japan. What explains this astonishing good news? Will rates continue to drop? 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MzN9AAcAAAAAA9FFOwrOIzHari58pWmYYsUmNzUIIthRt4UO3jjodHcVDqNt-SbyR-VgQUDGWYMzE5hR9BCr93oHGrviIv2Mk_TIchd2H2Rd7Cq9f3v7 
Our Briefing  
 this week sets out what we know.


 Elsewhere, changes to the law in Queensland, Australia, mean that children as young as ten can now be sentenced to life in prison for murder. Politicians from Brazil to Sweden are also trying to lower the age of criminal responsibility. How young is too young to 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MzN

75767.subject: рЯУ∞ AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest вАФ July 10
75767.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: Oleh Bezuhlyi


–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    –Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞–є—В–µ —Ж—О —Б—В–∞—В—В—О –љ–∞ LinkedIn, —Й–Њ–± –њ—А–Є—Ф–і–љ–∞—В–Є—Б—П –і–Њ –Њ–±–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А–µ–љ–љ—П
–Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞—В–Є –љ–∞ LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-10-oleh-bezuhlyi-h7y6f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BlFxU2FyFTp%2BOkbTKqdg5mw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3z0hNFO0JcDIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrf4wmib~zx-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrf4wmib-zx
  
рЯІ† AI's Crypto News Brief: Risk-on sentiment firmed as Bitcoin reclaimed $64K and Layer-2 momentum surged, with regulatory wins like Circle's bank charter offsetting lingering ETF outflows. Cautious optimism, driven by infrastructure and institutional adoption. рЯПЫпЄП Circle Wins Final Federal Approval for National Trust Bank Circle secured final OCC approval to establish First National Digital Currency Bank, N.A., moving its USDC operations into a unified federal framework and joining a growing list of crypto firms entering the regulated banking system. Shares jumped on the news. Read full story рЯЪА Robinhood Chain Flips Hyperliquid, Tops $1B in DEX Volume Just one week after mainnet launch, Robinhood's Ethereum Layer-2 surpassed $1 billion in cumulative DEX volume, briefly overtaking Hyperliquid in daily activity. The chain has drawn nearly 350,000 wallets and helped lift the broader market's Layer-2 rally. More details рЯУИ SK Hynix Raises Record $26.5B in Landmark US Listing SK Hynix raised $26.5 billion selling 177.9 million ADRs at $149 each вАФ the largest first-time US share sale by a foreign company, surpassing Alibaba. The offering was more than seven times oversubscribed, underscoring investor appetite for AI-memory chip exposure. Read more рЯЗѓрЯЗµ Metaplanet Explores Bitcoin-Backed Digital Credit in Japan Bitcoin treasury firm Metaplanet is working with JPYC and Progmat to study tokenized, Bitcoin-backed credit products aimed at building efficient, 24/7 credit markets in Japan. No product has launched yet, but the move signals deeper BTC integration into lending. See details рЯ§Ц Andreessen Lands Federal Reserve AI Task Force Role The Fed named a16z co-founder Marc Andreessen to co-lead a new AI productivity and jobs task force under Chair Kevin Warsh's policy review, placing a prominent crypto and tech investor at the center of the central bank's AI-and-labor policy debate. Read full story рЯЪ® Solana Genesis-Linked Wallet Drained of $14.2M A Solana wallet tied to the network's genesis distribution lost $14.2 million in a theft, renewing scrutiny over crypto security practices and raising fresh questions about the safety of long-dormant, high-value holdings across major networks. More details рЯФУ Ledger Reveals Laser Attack Flaw in Tangem Wallets Ledger researchers disclosed a laser-based attack that can reset Tangem card passwords by
